programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Chatsworth auction continues into the night; Ivy takes a bite out of the competition; Darrell takes charge without Brandon; Jarrod and Brandi come up big.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Santa Ana; Barry Weiss makes a purchase; Dave Hester has trouble leaving; one buyer makes a magic find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers encounter fierce competition from "The Kings of Swag" in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi feud; an item has an astronomical price tag.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders travel to San Jacinto, Calif.; Darrell makes a musical purchase; Brandi and Jarrod must team up with Barry in order to turn a profit; Nabila attempts to expand her territory.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Kory and Mackenzie bought land to build their future home in rural Spokane, Washington; however, squatters have taken it over and are impacting the nearby property; with the site completely trashed and interactions becoming hostile, Flash and his team step into one of their most unpredictable situations yet.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Trey's dream home renovation turns into a nightmare when he discovers squatters have taken over his Atlanta property; after forcing out two occupants, he's left battling a defiant holdout and a brazen fake landlord scheme fueling the chaos; but when Flash and his team arrive, they quickly realize this case will require a very different approach.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a shady real estate scam leaves Tamera fighting squatters who've seized her beautiful 58-acre property, with her beloved horses trapped inside; as the squatters taunt Flash and his team, tensions explode in a desperate fight to reclaim the land and rescue the animals.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Chesterfield, Virginia, a downstairs neighbor confrontation over moving noise quickly escalates; in Florida, a family is shocked when their doorbell camera captures a neighbor entering their home uninvited; and in Glenwood, Iowa, a man springs into action when an active shooter threatens his neighbor's home.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family in Iowa is horrified when they learn an intruder is lurking in their home while they sleep. A property line dispute in Texas gets personal with cursing, honking and a loud bang. And a Florida homeowner contends with racist verbal abuse from his next- door neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a Washington man is upset with his neighbors for burning wood in their backyard, it shockingly turns into a shootout; a Florida woman wrestles with an aggressive neighbor trying to force her way into her apartment.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman claims she owns a dog currently being cared for by a mother and son; another woman insists that her neighbor has been mistakenly planting flowers on her property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: War erupts between two neighbors in a Washington, D.C. parking lot, involving traffic cones and handwritten notes; a Santa Rosa, California, neighbor wears out his welcome donning a controversial shirt in his apartment complex.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man is at odds with his next-door neighbor over the property line and the animals on his farm.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida woman finds herself in hot water with a fellow resident in her building when she soaks in the hot tub after dark; two neighbors in California go head-to-head over newly-installed security cameras.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a man threatens a couple with pepper spray over their dog's behavior; in Georgia, a construction crew faces off with a neighbor determined to shut them down; in Kentucky, a woman renting out her home gets a wake-up call from a neighbor about a loud party at the property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An elderly New York couple find themselves in the middle of a dispute with their neighbors over a light in front of their house; in Nashville, Tennessee, two neighbors face off about a fence placed over their shared property line.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In New Jersey, a dispute between two pet owners intensifies and leads to a balcony brawl.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Boston, a couple accuses their neighbors of feeding their dog chicken bones; a Florida man cleaning his rental home makes a shocking discovery under the bed.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a pest control salesman going door to door is confronted by an irate neighbor; a terrifying midnight home invasion in Michigan ends with gunfire.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Oklahoma City woman loses her cool after accusing neighbors of letting their dog do its business right outside her patio; a Michigan family is shocked when a neighbor shows up at their front door with a loaded gun; and in California, a quick-thinking woman confronts suspected snack snatchers at a tennis club.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, neighbors call the police on a man who is blasting loud music and scattering household items in the street; construction workers in Georgia clash with a neighbor who accuses them of shoddy work; and in Nevada, a handyman is confronted by a man claiming to be with Homeland Security.

programme.desc: Donna and Paul are eager to complete the first room in their water mill. Terry and Ashley's entire chateau renovation is at risk when they discover water damage and rotten beams.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Cliff and Monika's place in the countryside near Loch Lomond, one B&Ber learns that maybe too much nature can be a bad thing in their jungle-themed room.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cardiff, Claire hosts a cruise-themed night. But will her maiden voyage into vegan cooking hit rocky waters.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: It's the quarter-final and the teams make afternoon teas and gravity-defying piñatas. Whose chance to progress has been and scone, and who'll smash the second challenge.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Howard and Sarah build a sleek, angled, metallic floating home on a tidal estuary near Worthing. But with the constant tidal shifts disrupting construction, will it sink or swim.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Peta is rushed to A&E after coming off her motorbike and being knocked unconscious. Callum has a badly prolapsed stoma. And Libby's been hit in the face while playing hockey.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A ten-week-old baby has choked on his milk. Tony has a flesh-eating leg infection. And is the bruising on Gerald's leg more serious than he realises.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to help Yvonne, who's in cardiac arrest. And in the Peaks, they land on top of a steep ridge where Donna collapsed while out walking.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants to find out if they've continued to follow his advice. How have Down City, Classic American and Davide fared in his absence.

programme.title: The Piano

programme.title: I for India

programme.title: The Field

programme.desc: Rebecca tries to persuade Sam to make Norm pay his bar tab after Norm has a big win on a bet. Frasier wants Lilith to confront her overbearing mother Betty.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Take Me Out of the Ball Game: Sam starts playing baseball again but struggles to fit in with his much younger teammates. Frasier loses Lilith's favourite lab rat.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray feels guilty when he meets a woman who he dated 25 years earlier and treated badly. He decides to apologise but soon regrets bringing up the past.

programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Castle
